name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 cup peanut butter, creamy or chunky
1/2 cup butter, cut in small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat an 8-inch square pan with vegetable cooking spray.
2. Put peanut butter, chocolate chips, and butter in a 3-quart microwave-safe bowl.
3. Microwave uncovered on high for 2 to 2 1/2 minutes until the butter melts and the chocolate chips look soft and glossy but still retain their shape.
4. Stir until smooth, then stir in marshmallows.
5. Microwave on high for 45 to 60 seconds. The marshmallows will be slightly melted. Stir to mix.
6. Stir in cereal until well blended.
7. Scrape into prepared pan; spread evenly.
8. Refrigerate 2 to 3 hours until firm.
9. Cut into 1 1/2 inch squares. Makes about 25 squares.
